description: 43 - 11-09-2024 - Meeting between Peter Mandelson and Lord Patrick Vallance,  (Minister for Science, Innovation, Research and Technology) 143
text:
(Minister for Science, Innovation, Research and Technology)
143

Regulation 
� 
PM asked what the RIO is? 
� 
PV highlighted that work on regulation is about getting regulators in speciﬁc 
areas to be pro-innovation in their approach as opposed to being solely focused 
on security.  
� 
PV added that we can learn lessons from how the MHRA changed the way they 
did things in the years after 2019 to meet with companies early, understand 
pipelines etc.  
144
